description: A driver is delayed by weather. The dispatcher must provide the customer with a new estimated time of arrival (ETA).

nodes.task_description: The driver reports a delay due to a snowstorm.

expected_outcome.value: The dispatcher logs the delay reason.

nodes.task_description: The system recalculates the ETA based on the driver's current location and the reduced speed.

expected_outcome.value: A new, later ETA is generated.

nodes.task_description: The dispatcher sends an automated notification to the customer with the revised ETA.

expected_outcome.value: The customer is proactively informed of the delay.
